4 · Findings by Account

M/S CRYSTAL MARKETING strong
Account Number 24704559049070 · Bandhan Bank · Score 1,107
Rank #1

This account is suspicious due to a large credit transaction of 5000000.00, which was then allocated into 26 subsequent debit transactions. The account also exhibits other unusual patterns, including structuring and round-value debits. These behaviors suggest potential money laundering or other illicit activities.

  • Money Trail Tracing strong — A credit of 5000000.00 was traced into 26 subsequent debit transactions, with the full amount allocated and none remaining untraced. (+8 more of this type)
  • Structuring Smurfing Detection strong — On 2025-05-10, the account made 23 credit transactions totaling 3648380.00, with each transaction below the individual cutoff. (+5 more of this type)
  • Failed Reversed Transaction Detection weak — A debit of 100000.00 was followed by a near-equal credit on the same day, indicating a potential failed reversed transaction.
  • Money Flow Graph Construction structural — A complex money-flow graph with 161 nodes and 338 directed transaction edges was constructed, suggesting a strong likelihood of suspicious activity.
  • Round Value Debit Patterns weak — The account made 19 suspicious round-value debits totaling 5728000.00, with repeated amounts of 300,000, 200,000, and 500,000.

Data Security & Method (Appendix)

What stays on this machine

  • All fraud detection, scoring and ranking run on this machine (deterministic code).
  • Raw bank statements and extracted transactions never leave the machine.
  • The money-flow graph, clusters and suspicion scores are computed locally.

What is sent to an external service

  • Only small, redacted text samples are sent to the language model to describe a statement's column layout when local parsing is insufficient.
  • For images / scanned PDFs, the page pixels are sent to a vision model (the one unavoidable case).
  • The language model only rewrites explanations into plain language; it never changes a number, account, or decision.
